_comment: Machine-readable deploy surface for Databricks Quest. Lets an external orchestrator (e.g. Control Tower) pull this repo, render the config/toggles, and deploy Quest via the Databricks Apps API WITHOUT reimplementing deploy.sh. Keep in sync with app/config.py + deploy.sh; tests/test_deploy_manifest.py guards it.

self_bootstrap.notes: master/standalone apply GameDay migrations on startup; master provisions the event-writer role when QUEST_EVENT_WRITER_PASSWORD is set. No external migration step needed.

config.label: Event Mode (Game Day)
config.help: Master kill-switch for Game Day. Off = legacy adoption app (Event APIs 404).

config.label: Federation role
config.help: standalone = single-workspace gameday; master = owns the shared DB + console; child = federates writes to the master.

config.label: Admin allowlist
config.help: Emails allowed to see the Admin page (defaults to the deploying user).

config.label: Host allowlist
config.help: Emails allowed to call host endpoints (create/start/freeze events). Fails closed if empty in Event Mode.

config.label: Data backend
config.help: Adoption data backend: lakebase (Postgres) or warehouse (read Delta via SQL warehouse).

config.label: Lakebase host
config.help: Lakebase endpoint host. For a child, this is the MASTER's endpoint.

config.label: Event-writer password
config.help: Password the master uses to create the shared event-writer role on boot; the deployer passes the same value to children as their writer credential.

config.label: Event slug
config.help: The event this child deployment is wired to.

config.label: Workspace id
config.help: Workspace id used to attribute this child's federated writes.

config.label: Writer role
config.help: INSERT-only writer role name on the master DB.

config.label: Writer credential
config.help: The shared event-writer credential (same value as the master's QUEST_EVENT_WRITER_PASSWORD).
